design_philosophy: High-tech security command center. Precision, density, and real-time responsiveness. Uses deep blacks with neon accents to highlight anomalies and terminal-inspired retro-futurism for a true cyber operations aesthetic.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase text-white
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase text-white

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full min-h-screen bg-[#050505] p-4 md:p-6 lg:p-8 font-sans
layout_and_spacing.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 lg:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.panels: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 p-4 lg:p-6 rounded-none relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col

surfaces_and_micro_themes.panel_style: Retro-Futurism (Terminal Look). Solid deep black backgrounds. 1px borders. Sharp edges (rounded-none). Use neon borders for active or alerting states.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10 for any sticky headers or overlays.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.scanlines: Optional repeating-linear-gradient overlay on the log console for a CRT monitor effect.

components_strategy.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary CTA uses brand green bg with black text, hover state adds drop-shadow glow (drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,255,65,0.5)]). Secondary uses transparent bg, 1px green border, green text.
components_strategy.blocks_visualization: Represented as rectangular nodes with hash IDs and timestamps. Connect them with lines or arrows. Mined blocks pulse green, attacker blocks pulse red. Use horizontal scrolling overflow for long chains.
components_strategy.log_console: Terminal window aesthetic. bg-[#050505] inset with 1px border. font-mono, neon green text on black. Auto-scrolls to bottom. Timestamps prefixed to each log line.
components_strategy.alert_panel: When L7 Sentinel detects attack, panel flashes with danger red border, heavy red text shadow, and warning icons.
components_strategy.status_indicators: Small pulsing dots (green = safe, red = attack) next to panel titles or system status headers.

motion_and_interactions.blocks: Framer motion for entry. { initial: { opacity: 0, x: 20 }, animate: { opacity: 1, x: 0 }, transition: { type: 'spring', stiffness: 200 } }
motion_and_interactions.alerts: CSS Keyframes for pulsing border or background on danger states.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Interactive items get subtle border color change to cyan or green and a tiny lift (-translate-y-px).

logo.description: x39Matrix protocol abstract geometric neon green logo

background_cyber.description: Abstract dark web3 cybersecurity background with neon nodes. Use at low opacity (10-20%) overlaid on the main background for texture.

server_rack.description: Dark glowing server rack for context/imagery if needed in side panels or idle state graphics.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind CSS classes. Apply Shadcn primitives for logic (Dialog, Tabs, Select) but override styles to be sharp, border-radius 0, and dark-themed.
Use `lucide-react` or `phosphor-react` for technical iconography (shield, server, activity, alert-triangle).
Install and configure google fonts for Chivo and JetBrains Mono.
Use `framer-motion` for smooth block appearance in the blockchain visualizations.
MUST add `data-testid` attributes to Start Simulation Button, L7 Sentinel Alert Panel, and Log Console for automated testing.
Chain visualization: Display Legitimate Chain and Attacker Chain in parallel horizontal tracks. Use varying colors to distinguish legitimate (green/cyan) from attacker (red/orange) blocks.
Simulate real-time progression using standard React `useEffect` intervals or intervals triggered by the Start Simulation button to push new block data and log entries sequentially.
